div1.entryFree:
Uncurrent, 1) not having currency, not passing in common payment: oft good turns are shuffled off with such u. pay, Tw. III, 3, 16 (viz with thanks). pray God, your voice, like a piece of u. gold, be not cracked within the ring, Hml. II, 2, 448.
2) objectionable: with what encounter so u. I have strained to appear thus, Wint. III, 2, 50.
